content: next-intl SEO: generateMetadata uses getTranslations({locale, namespace}) for localized title/description; alternates.languages set to {en: '/en/path', tr: '/tr/path'} for hreflang; sitemap.ts uses getPathname from @/i18n/navigation to build per-locale URLs; each sitemap entry gets alternates.languages with both locales; <html lang={locale}> is set in [locale]/layout.tsx; OG locale set per-page in generateMetadata openGraph.locale
